deckTitle: Finn for GITAM — Every Admissions Call Answered

slides.headline: Finn for GITAM
slides.subhead: The voice orchestration layer for GITAM's inbound admissions, enrollment, and student support lines.
slides.speakerNotes: Finn is the voice layer purpose-built for institutions like GITAM. One platform across admissions reception, enrollment nurture, and student retention calls.

slides.headline: Counselling lines buckle when applications spike
slides.subhead: Admissions desks lose the highest-intent callers during the windows that decide the intake.
bullets: Cut-off week floods — parents and applicants call across Telugu, Hindi, Tamil, Kannada, English. Most hit voicemail or hold music.
Repetitive triage — fee structure, hostel, scholarship, eligibility, deadline questions consume counsellor hours that should go to qualified leads.
After-hours drop-off — applicants research at night and on weekends. The desk is closed. The competition's chatbot is not.

stat.label: of admissions enquiries lost to abandoned or unanswered calls in peak weeks

slides.speakerNotes: GITAM's admissions team is fighting a queueing problem, not a quality problem. The intent is there — the bandwidth isn't.

slides.headline: One voice layer across every GITAM inbound line
slides.subhead: Finn picks up every call, in the caller's language, and writes the conversation back to your admissions CRM.
bullets: Always-on enrollment advisor — answers fee, course, eligibility, hostel, scholarship questions grounded in GITAM's own prospectus and FAQs.
Warm handoff to human counsellors — the moment a caller is qualified or sentiment turns, Finn transfers with full context.
Structured data back to your CRM — every call captured as a lead record, with intent, programme of interest, and next-step booked.
slides.speakerNotes: Finn isn't replacing counsellors. It's making sure the qualified caller actually reaches one.

slides.headline: Three steps to a live GITAM admissions agent
bullets: Build — Configure the Enrollment Advisor persona in a no-code editor. Upload GITAM prospectus, fee sheets, programme pages as the knowledge base.
Deploy — Attach to your existing admissions hotline or a new number. Route inbound 24×7 across Visakhapatnam, Hyderabad, Bengaluru campus lines.
Analyze — Every call transcribed, sentiment-scored, searchable. Pickup, programme interest, conversion to counsellor handoff on one dashboard.
slides.speakerNotes: Go-live in days. No telephony rip-and-replace. Numbers stay yours.

slides.headline: Finn handles eight admissions calls for the cost of one counsellor minute
slides.subhead: Modelled on ~5,000 inbound enquiry calls/month on the Growth plan.
slides.speakerNotes: Walk the panel through the comparison. The cost line drops; the connect rate climbs. Same counsellor team, more qualified conversations.

slides.headline: A parent calls at 9:47pm asking about B.Tech CSE fees
slides.subhead: Watch the Enrollment Advisor handle a real GITAM-style admissions enquiry end-to-end.
bullets: Caller — Parent of a Class XII student. Opens in Telugu. Asks about B.Tech CSE fee structure, scholarship eligibility, and hostel availability at the Visakhapatnam campus.
Finn — Greets in Telugu, switches to English mid-call when asked. Pulls live fee data, walks through merit scholarship slabs, confirms hostel availability, offers to book a campus visit.
Outcome — Campus visit slot booked on the admissions calendar. Lead written to CRM tagged 'B.Tech CSE / Vizag / scholarship intent / hot'. Counsellor pinged to follow up by 10am.
slides.speakerNotes: This is the call you're losing today. Finn doesn't just answer it — it qualifies, books, and hands off.

slides.headline: Built for the admissions desk
bullets: Sub-400ms latency — Caller hears a response in under half a second. No awkward AI pause.
46 languages, mid-call switching — Telugu, Hindi, Tamil, Kannada, English. Same persona, one call.
Knowledge base + RAG — Grounded in GITAM's prospectus, fee circulars, programme pages. No hallucinated dates.
Calendar booking in-call — Books campus visits, counsellor slots, open-day registrations without leaving the call.
Warm transfer — Hot leads and unhappy callers routed to a counsellor with the conversation summary attached.
Voicemail + silence detection — Knows when it's a real applicant vs a dropped line. Doesn't waste credits.
slides.speakerNotes: Six capabilities, each mapped to a real admissions desk failure mode.

slides.headline: What your admissions head sees on Monday morning
slides.subhead: Every call transcribed, tagged, and searchable across campuses and programmes.
bullets: Pickup by campus and shift — See where Visakhapatnam, Hyderabad, Bengaluru lines are dropping calls and when.
Conversion by programme — Which programmes convert enquiry to campus visit. B.Tech vs BBA vs Pharm.D, side by side.
Searchable transcripts — Find every caller who asked about a specific scholarship, programme, or competitor by name.
Sentiment + intent tagging — Hot leads surfaced automatically. Frustrated callers flagged for counsellor follow-up.
slides.speakerNotes: The admissions head stops guessing what the desk did last week. They see it.

slides.headline: Plugs into the stack GITAM already runs
bullets: CRM — Writes lead records, call summaries, and next-step tasks into your admissions CRM (Salesforce, Zoho, LeadSquared, or internal).
Calendar — Books campus visits and counsellor slots into Google Calendar or Outlook in real time.
Telephony — Keep your existing numbers via BYOC SIP. Inbound lines, IVR replacement, warm transfer to counsellor desks.
Comms — Drops follow-up brochures and forms over WhatsApp, SMS, or email the moment the call ends.
slides.speakerNotes: Finn slots into your existing admissions workflow. Numbers, CRM, calendar — all of it stays where it is.

slides.headline: Enterprise controls for an Indian university
bullets: Data residency in India — Call recordings, transcripts, and applicant PII stored on Indian infrastructure.
Consent + DNC management — Every caller hears Finn identify as AI on request. DNC lists honoured across campaigns.
Audit trail per call — Full transcript, model decisions, function calls, and handoffs logged for every interaction.
Number health monitoring — Degraded numbers auto-paused. SOC 2, HIPAA, GDPR controls available at the platform layer.
PII redaction — Applicant phone, fee, scholarship details masked in transcripts before they reach analytics.
slides.speakerNotes: Built for the controls a university registrar and a CISO both need to sign off.

slides.headline: What a similar India deployment looks like
slides.subhead: RocketSDR used Finn to cover a 24×7 helpline and stop drop-offs at the moment of decision.
slides.speakerNotes: Different industry, same shape of problem — high-intent inbound, narrow decision window, language diversity. The pattern holds for admissions.

slides.headline: Wallet-based. Pay per credit. Credits never expire
slides.subhead: All plans billed in INR with 18% GST. Phone numbers billed separately.
bullets: Starter — ₹10 per credit. 2 concurrent calls. For piloting a single admissions line.
Pro — ₹7 per credit. 20 concurrent calls. For a single-campus admissions desk.
Growth — ₹6 per credit. 100 concurrent calls. Recommended for GITAM's multi-campus peak intake.
Enterprise — Custom rate. Unlimited concurrent calls. For all-India campaigns and full-cycle student support.
slides.speakerNotes: Recommendation for GITAM is Growth during evaluation, with a path to Enterprise as inbound consolidates across campuses.

slides.headline: Two weeks to a live GITAM admissions agent
slides.subhead: A bounded evaluation on one campus line, measured against your current desk.
bullets: Week 1 — Build the Enrollment Advisor on GITAM prospectus, fee sheets, and programme pages. Voice and language QA with your team.
Week 2 — Go live on one inbound number at the Visakhapatnam campus. Measure pickup, conversion to counsellor handoff, and CSAT.
Decision point — Review against your current desk's numbers. Expand to Hyderabad and Bengaluru lines on approval.
slides.speakerNotes: A real evaluation, not a slideware promise. One campus, two weeks, your numbers next to ours.

testimonial.quote: RocketSDR improved candidate experience and reduced offer drop-offs with Finn 24×7 AI helpline and proactive escalations.
testimonial.author: Shivansh
